examples: Get out of your comfy seat, and have a damn good look at what you're up against.
Match the top with a camisole and comfy pants.
Choose a comfy chair, preferably one with armrests.
The owners proudly, and actively, encourage lounging, with free wi-fi and retro 1950s-style comfy furniture.
We didn't run for the fancy title or a big desk or a comfy chair.
